latest_coverage_summary: Live discovery on 2026-06-26 via WebSearch. Tier 1 swept across all jurisdictions (Commonwealth/AusTender, NSW eTendering/buy.nsw, Buying for Victoria, QTenders QLD, Tenders WA, Tenders SA, Tenders Tasmania, NT QTOL, ACT Tenders) — concrete open opportunities captured for Commonwealth (Defence DSRG), NSW (NSW Health / Far West LHD) and Tasmania (local council water services), plus still-open carry-forwards for NSW and SA. Tier 2 (GBE/public sector) reviewed: Sydney Water, Transgrid, Powerlink, Power and Water Corporation, CSIRO and NSW Health procurement channels confirmed and recorded as sources. Tier 3 (private sector) executed: SAP Ariba Discovery, BHP, Rio Tinto and EstimateOne (construction subcontractor) channels confirmed; their live opportunities are behind free supplier registration or invitation-only, so they are recorded as discovered_sources, not fabricated as tenders. CRITICAL LIMITATION: every buyer detail page (AusTender, NSW/VIC/QLD/SA/TAS portals, VendorPanel) returned HTTP 403 to the fetch tool (bot protection) and the egress policy blocked direct curl to those hosts, so all opportunity detail was reconstructed from search-result snippets only; no tender document could be opened this run.

tenders.title: Randwick High School — Fibre Network Upgrade
tenders.buyer: School Infrastructure NSW (NSW Department of Education)
tenders.description: Request for tender to upgrade the fibre-optic network at Randwick High School, part of the school's co-educational facility upgrade.
tenders.deliverables_summary: Supply and installation of an upgraded fibre-optic data network across the Randwick High School campus, delivering modern network connectivity for the upgraded co-educational facility.
key_deliverables: Installation and commissioning of network infrastructure
tenders.detail_source: buy.nsw listing + web search (tender id, closing time and contact)
tenders.reasoning: Surfaced via buy.nsw opportunity search; identity and contact confirmed by follow-up search.
tenders.notes: Full specification requires free buy.nsw registration; scope_of_work and requirements pending a detail pass.

tenders.title: Building construction & refurbishment works — Defence estate (DSRG)
tenders.buyer: Department of Defence (Defence Security & Estate Group)
tenders.description: A current series of Defence DSRG approaches to market (S-EST series) for building construction, refurbishment and maintenance works across Defence estate sites, closing mid-to-late July 2026.
tenders.deliverables_summary: Construction, refurbishment and maintenance works across Defence estate sites — covering works such as demolition, roofing, drainage, internal/external building refurbishment, and warehouse/amenities upgrades. The detailed scope of works for each site is released to tenderers only after a confidentiality agreement is signed.
mandatory_conditions: Signed Disclaimer and Confidentiality Agreement required to receive the full scope of works documentation
tenders.delivery_location: Various Defence sites (VIC, WA, ACT, NSW)
tenders.detail_source: AusTender current ATM list + web search (S-EST series; scope gated by confidentiality agreement)
tenders.reasoning: Surfaced on the AusTender current ATM list; multiple DSRG building-works ATMs are open. Represented as a program-level entry because individual scope documents are confidentiality-gated.
tenders.notes: UNVERIFIED at individual-ATM level — AusTender detail pages returned HTTP 403 and scopes are released only after a confidentiality agreement; specific tender_id and per-site closing dates need a detail pass.

tenders.title: Market sounding — Strategic Customer Engagement Program 2026–2029
tenders.description: Sydney Water is seeking market capability, experience and solutions for its next Strategic Customer Engagement program covering 2026–2029.
tenders.deliverables_summary: Pre-procurement market sounding to inform Sydney Water's Strategic Customer Engagement Program 2026–2029. Respondents are asked to share market capability, relevant experience and proposed solutions ahead of a formal procurement.
key_deliverables: Proposed solution / approach for customer engagement 2026–2029
tenders.submission_method: Via Sydney Water supplier portal (SAP Ariba); also listed on NSW eTendering
tenders.detail_source: Sydney Water current-tenders page + web search
tenders.reasoning: Discovered via source-discovery search of GBEs; Sydney Water publishes on SAP Ariba and lists current tenders on its own supplier page.
tenders.notes: Market sounding (not a binding RFT). Confirm closing timing on Sydney Water's current-tenders page.

tenders.notes: Headline-only — tender ID, dates and deliverables pending a detail pass (AusTender detail pages 403'd).

tenders.notes: Headline-only — confirm buyer agency, dates and deliverables on AusTender.

tenders.notes: Carry-forward, still open. Closing 01-Jul-2026 per search snippet; detail page not openable (HTTP 403), so scope and contacts remain unverified. first_seen retained from prior run.

tenders.source_name: Tenders SA / SA Department for Energy and Mining

tenders.buyer: SA Department for Energy and Mining
tenders.description: Competitive call for tenders over designated Hydrogen and Renewable Energy release areas (Gawler Ranges East and Whyalla West) under SA's Hydrogen and Renewable Energy Act framework.
tenders.eligibility: Open competitive call for the designated release areas.
tenders.delivery_location: Gawler Ranges East and Whyalla West, South Australia
tenders.reasoning: Carried forward from the 2026-06-25 run; closing 28-Jun-2026, still open this run.
tenders.notes: Carry-forward, closing-soon. Detail page not openable (HTTP 403); release-area boundaries, conditions and contacts unverified. first_seen retained from prior run. Note: tenders.sa.gov.au scheduled a brief maintenance outage on 25-Jun-2026.

tenders.notes: Closing date pending a detail pass on Tenders Tasmania.

tenders.notes: Closing date pending a detail pass.

tenders.title: Graphic and Digital Marketing Services to support industry engagements
tenders.buyer: Department of Defence — Capability Acquisition and Sustainment Group (Industry Engagement Division), DSRG
tenders.description: Defence's Industry Engagement Division (Capability Acquisition and Sustainment Group) is seeking graphic and digital marketing services plus event-management support for virtual events, to support delivery of international trade events and promote Australian defence industry.
tenders.deliverables_summary: Provision of graphic design and digital marketing collateral together with event-management support for virtual/online events, used to deliver international trade events and promote the Australian defence industry to international and domestic audiences.
key_deliverables: Graphic design and digital marketing materials
Support for delivery of international trade events
tenders.eligibility: Open to all suppliers (publicly advertised RFT).
tenders.detail_source: AusTender Current ATM View snippet for ATM 80064 (search result); full ATM page and documents returned HTTP 403.
tenders.reasoning: Found via AusTender keyword search for newly published ATMs closing in June 2026; buyer-originated on the Commonwealth AusTender portal.
tenders.notes: Scope, closing time and delivery timeframe (08/07/2026) taken from the AusTender search snippet; the ATM detail page and any attached documents could not be opened (HTTP 403), so values, evaluation criteria and contact remain unverified.

tenders.title: DEF8101 Market Scan Activity — Industry Notification
tenders.description: Industry notification of a market-scan activity under the DEF8101 program, inviting industry to register interest ahead of a future Defence procurement.
tenders.reasoning: Surfaced via AusTender keyword search for Defence ATMs closing 26-Jun-2026; buyer-originated on AusTender.
tenders.notes: Headline only — captured from search snippet (title and closing 26-Jun-2026 5:00pm ACT). The notice detail page returned HTTP 403, so scope, deliverables and the exact ATM URL are unconfirmed.

tenders.title: Air Transport and Remote Health Services for Regional and Rural NSW (Far West LHD)
tenders.buyer: NSW Ministry of Health / Far West Local Health District
tenders.description: NSW Health is seeking a provider (or providers) to deliver air transport and a bundle of remote health services across regional and rural NSW, anchored in the Far West Local Health District.
tenders.deliverables_summary: Provision of inter-hospital patient transfers and fixed-wing transport for clinicians, plus delivery of remote/rural health services including medical primary health care clinics, remote oral health services, and drug and alcohol information and counselling services across the Far West Local Health District and regional/rural NSW.
key_deliverables: Inter-hospital patient transfers across regional and rural NSW
Fixed-wing transport for clinicians to provide health services in rural and remote communities
Medical primary health care clinics in Far West LHD
Remote oral health services in Far West LHD
Drug and alcohol information and counselling services in Far West LHD
tenders.eligibility: Open (publicly advertised RFT via NSW eTendering).
tenders.delivery_location: Far West Local Health District, regional and rural NSW
tenders.detail_source: Scope reconstructed from GovMarket aggregator listing snippet (discovery signal); buyer-originated NSW eTendering page could not be opened (HTTP 403).
tenders.reasoning: Discovered via a GovMarket aggregator listing used only as a discovery signal; recorded against the buyer-originated source (NSW eTendering / NSW Ministry of Health). Aggregator is NOT treated as the source of truth.
tenders.notes: Closing date 16-Jul-2026 and service scope are snippet-derived via an aggregator and still need confirmation on the buyer's own NSW eTendering notice; RFT number, value and contacts unverified.

tenders.title: Sandford Oval Water Delivery Services (2026–2031)
tenders.description: Tender for the provision of water delivery services to Sandford Oval over the 2026–2031 period.
tenders.reasoning: Found via Tenders Tasmania / Tasmanian local-government tender search for opportunities closing in late June 2026.
tenders.notes: Headline only — title, 2026–2031 term and closing 26-Jun-2026 from search snippet. The exact issuing council and the detail page could not be confirmed (portal not directly readable); buyer recorded approximately.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Identified as the buyer behind the Randwick High School fibre tender; recurring education construction & ICT procurement via buy.nsw.
discovered_sources.notes: Buyer agency rather than a separate portal; tenders appear on buy.nsw.

discovered_sources.notes: Machine-readable — prefer over scraping HTML for NSW.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Known GBE from prior run; re-checked this run.
discovered_sources.notes: Lists current tenders; also mirrored on NSW eTendering (tenders.nsw.gov.au/sydneywater).

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Canonical seed; queried this run for June 2026 ATMs.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Canonical seed source confirmed live.

discovered_sources.source_name: SAP Ariba Discovery / SAP Business Network Discovery
discovered_sources.how_discovered: Mandatory Tier 3 channel; re-checked this run.
discovered_sources.notes: Public posting board for corporate RFx; full opportunity detail requires a free SAP Business Network supplier account. No publicly visible AU opportunity captured without login this run.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Known major buyer; re-checked this run.
discovered_sources.notes: Opportunities via SAP Ariba + GCMS (interestedsupplier.bhp.com); registration-gated, no public RFx captured.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Tier 3 sweep of transport/logistics buyers.
discovered_sources.notes: Engagement via email + Coupa Supplier Portal; no public RFP list. Opportunities are invitation/registration based.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Tier 3 sweep of retail buyers.
discovered_sources.notes: Supplier onboarding portal; live opportunities handled via relationship managers, not publicly listed.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Tier 3 sweep of retail buyers.
discovered_sources.notes: All Coles tenders are conducted via the Ariba Network (free registration); RangeMe is the product-supplier discovery channel. Individual tenders are login-gated.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Canonical seed; RSS feed known from prior run.
discovered_sources.notes: RSS feed and HTML both returned HTTP 403 to the fetch tool and the egress policy blocked direct curl; needs a non-blocked or authenticated channel.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Searched NSW GBE utilities; Transgrid publishes its tenders on its NSW eTendering sub-site.
discovered_sources.notes: Grid-forming BESS RFPs (~1GW of stabilising services) flagged to begin H2 2026; buyer-originated on NSW eTendering.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Searched QLD energy GBEs; Powerlink runs tenders via the Queensland Procurement Solution (VendorPanel).
discovered_sources.notes: Suppliers register on VendorPanel to receive notifications; buyer-originated transmission GBE.

discovered_sources.source_name: Power and Water Corporation (NT) — Opportunities to tender
discovered_sources.how_discovered: Searched NT utilities; Power and Water advertises all tenders via the NT Government QTOL portal.
discovered_sources.notes: Mandatory minimum 30% local-content evaluation criterion on competitive procurements.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Searched public research bodies; CSIRO procurements over A$400k run via AusTender.
discovered_sources.notes: CSIRO's SAP Ariba supplier portal was retired 25-Mar-2024; tenders now publish on AusTender.

discovered_sources.source_name: NSW Health — Strategic Procurement / Health tenders
discovered_sources.how_discovered: Searched public-health procurement; gateway page to Local Health District tenders advertised on buy.nsw.
discovered_sources.notes: Covers HealthShare NSW and Local Health District opportunities (e.g. Far West LHD air-transport RFT captured this run).

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Tier 3 mining sweep; Rio Tinto issues RFx via SAP Ariba / SAP Business Network.
discovered_sources.notes: Registration-gated. Rio Tinto spent A$19.7bn with 6,000+ Australian suppliers in 2025; individual sourcing events require an authenticated Ariba/SBN account.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Tier 3 construction sweep; E1 is Australia's largest commercial construction tender platform for head-contractor to subcontractor packages.
discovered_sources.notes: Free trade account required to view live package closing dates; 900+ builders, 50,000+ subcontractors. Packages uploaded by builders (ITT/RFQ + drawings/specs/SOW).

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Prior-run recommended addition; QLD eTender current-opportunities list (alongside QTenders directory and supply.qld.gov.au migration).
discovered_sources.notes: Returned HTTP 403 to the fetch tool this run; QLD is also migrating procurement to VendorPanel via supply.qld.gov.au — check both.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Canonical local-government channel; re-checked this run.
discovered_sources.notes: Used by most Australian councils; returned HTTP 403 to the fetch tool this run. Registration required to download documents/submit.
